description: Lap 1 writes a corrected output.json: adds the missing plan section and fixes icd10_codes from the invalid 'ABC' to real, correctly-shaped ICD-10-CM codes. JsonSchemaGate validates cleanly on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read schema.json: patient_id/encounter_date/subjective/objective/assessment/plan/icd10_codes are all required, additionalProperties is false, icd10_codes entries must match the ICD-10-CM pattern. Read output.json: plan is missing entirely and icd10_codes contains 'ABC', which does not match the pattern. Adding a plan consistent with the assessment and fixing the codes to valid ICD-10-CM values (E11.9 for new-onset type 2 diabetes, I10 for the noted elevated blood pressure).

actions.content:
{
  "patient_id": "PT-10492",
  "encounter_date": "2026-07-06",
  "subjective": "Patient reports increased thirst, frequent urination, and fatigue over the past 3 weeks. No prior diabetes diagnosis. Denies chest pain or blurred vision.",
  "objective": "Vitals: BP 138/86, HR 82, BMI 31.2. Random plasma glucose 248 mg/dL. Fasting glucose repeated at 212 mg/dL. No acanthosis nigricans noted.",
  "assessment": "New-onset type 2 diabetes mellitus, likely contributed to by obesity. Elevated blood pressure noted, monitor for hypertension.",
  "plan": "Start metformin 500mg twice daily with meals, titrate as tolerated. Order HbA1c and lipid panel. Refer to nutrition for diabetic diet counseling. Recheck fasting glucose and blood pressure in 4 weeks. Advise home glucose monitoring twice daily.",
  "icd10_codes": ["E11.9", "I10"]
}

interactions.notes: The fix — output.json now validates against schema.json. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
